rulings.Case Title: WALTER YEE et al VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 9, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to December 13, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 17, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC VS. SOFIA FLORES et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 9, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION DENIED. Based on financial information provided the judgment debtor, the judgment creditor is entitled to garnish the full amount of disposable earnings per pay period per CCP 706.050 and USC 1673(a) Title 15. The Court notes that judgment debtor accounted for medical expenses and life insurance expenses twice; that judgment debtor did no list any dependents; that judgment debtor has a high balance owed on an auto loan (no information provided as to when the car was purchased and what are the terms of financing); judgment debtor pays unsecured creditors. = (501/REQ)
